category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device compliance comparison for Peru market entry (MTC / OSIPTEL / INACAL).

title.en: China-to-Peru Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (MTC / OSIPTEL)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入秘鲁：合规差距矩阵（MTC / OSIPTEL）
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入秘魯：合規差距矩陣（MTC / OSIPTEL）

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT device documentation against Peruvian MTC mandatory homologación (radio and telecom terminal equipment type approval under TUO de la Ley de Telecomunicaciones DS 013-93-TCC), OSIPTEL regulatory oversight, INACAL NTP standards (adopting IEC/CISPR) for EMC and electrical safety, SUNAT RUC importer registration, Spanish labelling requirements, and INDECOPI consumer data guidelines on cybersecurity. Peru operates at 220 V / 60 Hz with Type A/B/C plugs. FCC, CE, SRRC, and CCC approvals are not recognised by MTC; separate Peruvian homologación is required.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备文件与秘鲁MTC强制型式认证（依据《电信法》TUO DS 013-93-TCC的无线电及电信终端设备型号认证）、OSIPTEL监管、INACAL NTP标准（采用IEC/CISPR）的EMC及电气安全要求、SUNAT RUC进口商登记、西班牙语标注要求，以及INDECOPI消费者数据网络安全指南的差距对照。秘鲁采用220V/60Hz、A/B/C型插头。FCC、CE、SRRC和CCC认证均不被MTC认可；须另行申请秘鲁型式认证。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置文件與秘魯MTC強制型式認證（依據《電信法》TUO DS 013-93-TCC的無線電及電信終端設備型號認證）、OSIPTEL監管、INACAL NTP標準（採用IEC/CISPR）的EMC及電氣安全要求、SUNAT RUC進口商登記、西班牙語標注要求，以及INDECOPI消費者資料網路安全指引的差距對照。秘魯採用220V/60Hz、A/B/C型插頭。FCC、CE、SRRC和CCC認證均不被MTC認可；須另行申請秘魯型式認證。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, MTC homologación, OSIPTEL ruling, INACAL certification, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current MTC resolutions, OSIPTEL regulations, INACAL NTP standards, INDECOPI guidelines, SUNAT RUC requirements, and Peruvian import and labelling requirements with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or sale in Peru.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、MTC型式认证、OSIPTEL裁决、INACAL认证、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在向秘鲁发货或销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行MTC决议、OSIPTEL法规、INACAL NTP标准、INDECOPI指南、SUNAT RUC要求及秘鲁进口和标签要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、MTC型式認證、OSIPTEL裁決、INACAL認證、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在向秘魯發貨或銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行MTC決議、OSIPTEL法規、INACAL NTP標準、INDECOPI指引、SUNAT RUC要求及秘魯進口和標籤要求。

answer_first.en: The main Peru compliance gaps for a China-made Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or IoT device are: MTC mandatory homologación — all radio and telecom terminal equipment must obtain an MTC homologation certificate and display the approval number on a Spanish-language label before import or sale, with no recognition of FCC, CE, SRRC, or CCC approvals; INACAL NTP EMC standards (IEC/CISPR-aligned) and electrical safety standards (IEC 62368-1-aligned, 220 V / 60 Hz); SUNAT RUC importer registration; and INDECOPI consumer data guidelines (advisory only, not a mandatory product certification) for connected devices. Peru operates at 220 V / 60 Hz with Type A/B/C plugs — Chinese hardware typically requires a power adapter or power supply rated for 220 V / 60 Hz.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的Wi-Fi、蓝牙或物联网设备进入秘鲁的主要合规差距为：MTC强制型式认证——所有无线电及电信终端设备在进口或销售前须取得MTC型式认证证书并在西班牙语标签上标注认证编号，不认可FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准；INACAL NTP EMC标准（对应IEC/CISPR）和电气安全标准（对应IEC 62368-1，220V/60Hz）；SUNAT RUC进口商登记；以及针对联网设备的INDECOPI消费者数据指南（仅为顾问性，非强制性产品认证）。秘鲁采用220V/60Hz，A/B/C型插头——中国硬件通常需要额定220V/60Hz的电源适配器。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的Wi-Fi、藍牙或物聯網裝置進入秘魯的主要合規差距為：MTC強制型式認證——所有無線電及電信終端設備在進口或銷售前須取得MTC型式認證證書並在西班牙語標籤上標注認證編號，不認可FCC、CE、SRRC或CCC核准；INACAL NTP EMC標準（對應IEC/CISPR）和電氣安全標準（對應IEC 62368-1，220V/60Hz）；SUNAT RUC進口商登記；以及針對聯網裝置的INDECOPI消費者資料指引（僅為顧問性，非強制性產品認證）。秘魯採用220V/60Hz，A/B/C型插頭——中國硬件通常需要額定220V/60Hz的電源適配器。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
